prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve already done the hardest part: you’ve decided to begin. Remember, you don’t need to do it perfectly—just put one foot in front of the other. Every small step you take chips away at that mountain, and future you will be so grateful you started now. You’ve faced challenges before, and you always come out stronger. Take a deep breath, trust yourself, and go crush it! You’ve got this! 💪
